It's just a PSA. It's a PSA for everybody who has money or is in tech. Actually, it's...
turns.zh: 这和我们从头到尾讨论的很多内容相关。你的职业生涯仍然可以是一个巨大而开阔的空间。这个世界仍然是可以塑造的。就像我们可以创造它。我们可以创造我们想要的东西。这就是我……天哪，我喜欢做设计师，因为我们可以创造我们想在这个世界上看到的一部分东西，即使我们不能控制一切。这只是一个公益广告。这是一个给所有有钱或从事科技行业的人的公益广告。实际上，它是……

turns.en: I love that. And I think now that the means of production is effectively being democratized, what a great time to be a designer. Like I'm so grateful for this core set of skills in terms of what it will require to make a true impact and actually shape the future.
turns.zh: 我喜欢这个。而且我认为，既然生产资料正在被有效地民主化，现在成为设计师是多么好的时机。就像我非常感激这套核心技能，因为它将需要这些技能来产生真正的影响并实际塑造未来。

turns.en: I am a staunch believer that the people who know how to get the outcomes from these tools are the ones that are going to make the things that win. And at the end of the day, your title doesn't matter as much as your skills. And those skills are blending together. And that's fun if you love learning and if you love challenging yourself.
turns.zh: 我坚信，知道如何从这些工具中获得结果的人，才是那些能做出成功作品的人。归根结底，你的头衔不如你的技能重要。而这些技能正在融合。如果你热爱学习、热爱挑战自己，那会很有趣。

turns.en: I love it. Well, Sarah, this has been beautiful and as human as this show has ever gotten. So, I appreciate you coming on.
turns.zh: 我喜欢。那么，Sarah，这很美好，也是这个节目有史以来最人性化的一次。所以，感谢你的到来。

turns.en: It was great. I love it. I'm going to feed it in. Maybe we'll... I'll see if the editor can create some kind of visual representation by the time this goes live. We'll see if it gets close to your vision. Well, thank you for coming on, Sarah. This was a blast.
turns.zh: 太棒了。我喜欢。我会把它输入进去。也许我们……我会看看编辑能否在节目上线前创建某种视觉表现。我们看看它是否接近你的愿景。那么，感谢你的到来，Sarah。这太棒了。

turns.en: Yeah, it was so fun to get to know you better today, too. And just shouts for everything that you do for the community. And it's just... I love positive spaces on the internet. So, thank you for doing what you do.
turns.zh: 是的，今天也更了解你了，非常有趣。并且为你为社区所做的一切喝彩。而且……我喜欢互联网上的积极空间。所以，感谢你所做的一切。

turns.en: Before I let you go, I want to take just one minute to run you through my favorite products because I'm constantly asked what's in my stack. Framer is how I build websites. Genway is how I do research. Granola is how I take notes during crit. Jitter is how I animate my designs. Lovable is how I build my ideas in code. Mobin is how I find design inspiration. Paper is how I design like a creative and Raycast is my shortcut every step of the way. Now, I've hand selected these companies so that I can do these episodes full-time. So, by far the number one way to support the show is to check them out. You can find the full list at dive.comclub/partners.
turns.zh: 在你走之前，我想花一分钟向你介绍我最喜欢的产品，因为我经常被问到我的工具栈是什么。Framer 是我构建网站的方式。Genway 是我做研究的方式。Granola 是我在评审期间做笔记的方式。Jitter 是我为设计制作动画的方式。Lovable 是我用代码实现想法的方式。Mobin 是我寻找设计灵感的方式。Paper 是我像创意人一样设计的方式，而 Raycast 是我每一步的快捷方式。现在，我亲手挑选了这些公司，这样我就能全职做这些节目。所以，到目前为止，支持这个节目的首要方式就是去看看它们。你可以在 dive.comclub/partners 找到完整列表。

consensus.en: Designers must inject meaning by finding simple human truths for their audience.
consensus.zh: 设计师必须通过为受众找到简单的人性真相来注入意义。

consensus.en: Brands need to become more generative and malleable, not pixel-perfect and rigid.
consensus.zh: 品牌需要变得更具生成性和可塑性，而非像素完美和僵化。

consensus.en: AI tools level the playing field; curiosity and taste matter more than experience.
consensus.zh: AI 工具拉平了竞争环境；好奇心和品味比经验更重要。

consensus.en: Just enough research prevents analysis paralysis; pair it with rapid prototyping.
consensus.zh: 恰到好处的研究可防止分析瘫痪；将其与快速原型制作相结合。

consensus.en: Designers should own their destiny by continuously learning and adapting to AI.
consensus.zh: 设计师应通过持续学习和适应 AI 来掌握自己的命运。

contrarian.en: Bad taste is exemplified by chasing tired trends, not by being genuinely bad.
contrarian.zh: 糟糕的品味体现在追逐过时的趋势，而非真正的糟糕。

contrarian.en: Synthetic humans in research are insufficient; real human input is still essential.
contrarian.zh: 研究中的合成人类不够；真实的人类输入仍然必不可少。

contrarian.en: Over-researching can kill momentum; confidence and excitement are more valuable.
contrarian.zh: 过度研究会扼杀动力；信心和兴奋更为宝贵。

contrarian.en: AI tools should be used as critics and interviewers, not just answer machines.
contrarian.zh: AI 工具应被用作评论者和采访者，而不仅仅是答案机器。

contrarian.en: Trust in AI companies like Anthropic is a leap of faith, not just marketing.
contrarian.zh: 对 Anthropic 等 AI 公司的信任是一种信念的飞跃，而不仅仅是营销。
